query: DELETE FROM lead_history WHERE leadId IN (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead %' OR nome LIKE 'Test%' OR nome LIKE 'Teste%'); DELETE FROM lead_status_transitions WHERE leadId IN (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead %' OR nome LIKE 'Test%' OR nome LIKE 'Teste%'); DELETE FROM agendamentos WHERE leadId IN (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead %' OR nome LIKE 'Test%' OR nome LIKE 'Teste%');
